This project is a Python application that uses AWS SQS for sending and receiving messages. Please generate code that follows best practices for AWS SDK usage and Python scripting.
I am using Kubernetes for deployment, so please ensure any deployment scripts or manifests are compatible with Kubernetes standards.
I have a Nvidia GPU available, so if the code involves any computational tasks, consider using GPU acceleration where applicable.
I am using Helm for managing Kubernetes applications, so please provide Helm charts or templates for any Kubernetes resources needed.
Follow AWS best practices for security, including the use of IAM roles and policies.
Ensure that any AWS resources created are tagged appropriately for cost allocation and management.
